creator: gd@rambler-co.ru
text:
On Fri, 26 Oct 2012 17:57:10 +0200
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> On Fri, Oct 26, 2012 at 07:26:18PM +0400, Denis Generalov wrote:
> > 
> > Hi Guido,
> > 
> > Unfortunately I found tiny but serious problem.
> > May I ask you to hold this pr?
> > I will send new patch in a couple hours.
> 
> Ok, no problem.
> 
> I must anyway to wait for maintainer's approval before committing.
> 
> -- 
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>

Hello Guido and Christer.

Sorry for delay. Unexpectedly Halloween happend.

I found 2 new places where path to config dir (/etc/salt) had been hardcoded.
So I made new patch. You can find this it attachment.

-- 
Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
